ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Checksum, Image_Base) */,
  "partition" TEXT /* Partition of the feature (e.g., Q) */,
  "nbins" INTEGER /* Number of bins for the feature */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the feature belongs to */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Metadata ME, Query Performance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the metric belongs to */,
  "time_cost_median" REAL /* Median time cost for the feature */,
  "time_cost_low_quartile" REAL /* Low quartile time cost for the feature */,
  "time_cost_high_quartile" REAL /* High quartile time cost for the feature */,
  "time_cost_low_whisker" REAL /* Low whisker time cost for the feature */,
  "time_cost_high_whisker" REAL /* High whisker time cost for the feature */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "memory_usage_median" REAL /* Median memory usage */,
  "memory_usage_low_quartile" REAL /* Low quartile memory usage */,
  "memory_usage_high_quartile" REAL /* High quartile memory usage */,
  "memory_usage_low_whisker" REAL /* Low whisker memory usage */,
  "memory_usage_high_whisker" REAL /* High whisker memory usage */,
  "cpu_usage_median" REAL /* Median CPU usage */,
  "cpu_usage_low_quartile" REAL /* Low quartile CPU usage */,
  "cpu_usage_high_quartile" REAL /* High quartile CPU usage */,
  "cpu_usage_low_whisker" REAL /* Low whisker CPU usage */,
  "cpu_usage_high_whisker" REAL /* High whisker CPU usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, DevOps) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
